prompt: Create an ultra-realistic luxury fashion editorial portrait of a beautiful female model wearing a strapless deep burgundy satin couture gown. The gown has a structured folded neckline, sculptural draping across the bodice, one dramatic oversized bow detail at the right hip, a floor-length skirt with a long trailing train, and one thigh-high front slit revealing one leg. Style the model with an elegant loose updo in dark brown, glowing warm skin, delicate gold drop earrings, and minimalist gold strappy high-heel sandals. Pose her standing in a warm beige architectural studio with one large arched opening on the left, geometric beige blocks and a waist-high rectangular pedestal on the right; her right hand rests on the pedestal, her left arm hangs relaxed, her head turned slightly to the side in a poised campaign pose. Use cinematic golden sunlight with soft diagonal shadows across the wall, rich satin highlights, warm neutral tones, shallow editorial depth, full-body vertical composition, luxury magazine campaign aesthetic, ultra-realistic 8K detail. The model’s face should be softly anonymized or obscured, while the outfit and pose remain crisp and photorealistic. Avoid text, logos, watermarks, extra people, or additional accessories.
